description: In an emergency, a control room operator must use the personnel tracking system to find the location of every person underground.

nodes.task_description: An emergency alarm is activated. Immediately bring up the personnel tracking system dashboard.

expected_outcome.value: A map showing the last known location of all personnel underground is displayed.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all personnel currently underground and their assigned refuge station.

expected_outcome.value: A complete muster list is generated.

nodes.task_description: As personnel arrive at the refuge stations, check them off the list to quickly identify anyone who is missing.

expected_outcome.value: The system provides a real-time view of who is safe and who is still unaccounted for, guiding the search and rescue team.
